judge_thought:
Explanation: We need to count clerks whose "started" year is before 1959. The entries are:
- 1957: Kenneth W. Dam (before 1959)
- 1957: Alan C. Kohn (before 1959)
- 1958: William C. Canby, Jr. (before 1959)
- 1958: Heywood H. Davis (before 1959)
- 1959: Jerome B. Libin (not before 1959)
- 1959: Patrick F. McCartan (not before 1959)
- 1961: D. Lawrence Gunnels (not before 1959)
Thus, there are 4 clerks who started before 1959.
